info.title: PaloNexus agent-idp API
info.description: Agent identity, governance, provisioning, delegations, revocation, directory sync, authority preview, API keys, and STS token exchange. The reference IdP-neutral agent-identity service.

post.description:
Cryptographic egress identity for the control plane: verify an agent's VP
and map the proven did:key back to its registered name. Fail-closed.

Reconcile a per-tenant SCIM snapshot (Users + Groups). Idempotent:
re-posting the same snapshot reports everything `unchanged`. Tenant-scoped.

Resolve a login-token claim set against the SCIM directory under source
precedence. SCIM is authoritative; token contributes session context + surfaces
conflicts. A stale token never reactivates an inactive employee.

get.description: Employees who have resolved a login token (recent sign-ins), newest first.
The MVP resource-ownership map (Feature 5) used by the resource_owner basis.

post.description:
Read-only ELIGIBILITY preview: may a persona own/sponsor/approve/operate/
audit a PaloNexus scenario, over the seeded ``org:agents:*`` authority model?

This is the policy simulator's design-time "Authority preview" mode, backed
verbatim by the seed AuthorityEngine. It is explicitly NOT enforcement — for a
runtime-faithful allow/deny use the control-plane ``/authz`` dry-run.

Mint an SDK API key (``pn_live_…`` / ``pn_test_…``). Only the salted hash
is stored — the plaintext is returned ONCE here and is unrecoverable after.

Issue a new secret for an existing key; the prior secret stops working
immediately. Plaintext returned ONCE.

Resolve a plaintext key to its record + stamp last-used. Revoked/unknown
keys fail closed (``ok=false``). Consumed by the control plane / SDK gateway.

Exchange delegation evidence + agent proof for a short-lived, audience-bound
agent access token (sub=agent, act=human). Fails closed; every outcome audited.

get.description: The STS token audit log — issued + denied (metadata only, never token contents).

ApiKeyRecord.title: ApiKeyRecord
ApiKeyRecord.description:
The browser-/SDK-safe view of a key. The plaintext and its hash are NEVER
in here — only a masked display string + the last four chars.

AuthorityPreviewRequest.title: AuthorityPreviewRequest

CreateKeyRequest.title: CreateKeyRequest

CreateKeyResponse.title: CreateKeyResponse
CreateKeyResponse.description:
Create/rotate response. ``plaintext`` is shown EXACTLY ONCE — it is not
stored (only its salted hash is) and can never be retrieved again.

DirectorySyncRequest.title: DirectorySyncRequest
DirectorySyncRequest.description:
A per-tenant SCIM snapshot. ``users``/``groups`` are raw SCIM 2.0 resources
(camelCase, incl. the enterprise extension); ``tenantId``/``idp`` are control
fields. The reconcile is a full-snapshot diff, so re-running is idempotent.

ResolveIdentityRequest.title: ResolveIdentityRequest
ResolveIdentityRequest.description:
A decoded login-token claim set to resolve against the SCIM directory under
source precedence. ``idp``/``tenant`` are optional hints; otherwise the token
``iss`` is matched through the issuer map. (MVP: claims are trusted edge input —
no JWT signature verification; deferred to BACKLOG.)

VerifyKeyRequest.title: VerifyKeyRequest
VerifyKeyRequest.description:
Resolve a plaintext key to its record (and stamp last-used). Used by the
control plane / SDK gateway to authenticate an ``pn_live_…`` / ``pn_test_…``
bearer. Revoked or unknown keys fail closed.
